gist.headline: Text service gets a turbo boost
gist.blurb: We've swapped the engine of our text API from Express to Hono. It's lighter, faster, and now speaks fluent TypeScript.
gist.summary: Migrated the text generation backend to the Hono framework and converted the codebase to TypeScript for better performance and type safety.
gist.impact: Users will see faster response times and improved streaming reliability.
gist.visual_concept: The text service server getting an engine upgrade. Hono (flame) and TypeScript (structure) themes. Robot installing the new core.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the robot character installing a glowing lime green (#ecf874) flame sprite into a retro server rack. The bee mascot hovers nearby holding a blueprint. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, chunky pixels, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
